LanguageData.P_UseUnsafePatchesDesc: 可以优先处理更多事情，但不安全。
LanguageData.P_UseLowerAsHighPriorityTitle: 将低优先级作为高优先级
LanguageData.P_DesignatorThingDesc: 确定蓝图、指定等的优先次序。
LanguageData.P_DesignatorCellLabel: 单元格上方自动优先级
LanguageData.P_DesignatorCellDesc: 绘制单元格以自动为这些格子上的物品分配优先级。定期同步到物品优先级。
LanguageData.P_CellSyncModeTitle: 单元格上方自动优先级同步
LanguageData.P_CellSyncImmediateAndPeriodic: 绘制时立即同步 + 定期（推荐）
LanguageData.P_SelectionOptionsDesc: Filter for Thing Priority designator. Highlights matching things on the map while selected.
LanguageData.P_SetPriorityDesc: Three preset buttons: negative, 0, positive. Left-click to apply; right-click negative/positive to choose a preset (±1–±5, saved in mod settings).\nIf you are using a priority designator, click this button to set priority to 0.
